generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values order and preparedness, you know how important it is to have a strong civil defense system. Did you know that recent cuts to preparedness funding have left communities vulnerable? It's our duty to ensure our families and neighbors are safe. Let's make sure our leaders prioritize civil defense so we're never caught off guard. #NationalSecurity #CommunitySafety
